creator: markj@FreeBSD.org
text:
I posted a patch to fix this plus some related issues: https://reviews.freebsd.org/D47521

However, the problem isn't a leak per se, it's that the check in alloc_bounce_zone() fails to find the existing bounce zone when the DMA tag's alignment is < PAGE_SIZE.  In particular, bounce zones are not private to a DMA tag; they're on a global linked list and can be shared, but the check which decides whether to use an existing zone is broken, so we allocate a new zone each time, which manifests as a leak.
